mapper.insert: insert into process_trace(session_id, message_id, step_name, step_status, detail_json) values(#{sessionId}, #{messageId}, #{stepName}, #{stepStatus}, #{detailJson})
mapper.select: select * from process_trace where session_id=#{sessionId} order by created_at asc, id asc
select * from process_trace order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}
